plays.headline: GXO Logistics — Warehouse / light-industrial whitespace in Phoenix, AZ

gm.math_note: 15 open reqs × 91% our realized fill × 0.6 cold-geo haircut ≈ 8 winnable heads × $9.00/hr spread × 1052h/assignment.

evidence.label: 15 Warehouse / light-industrial reqs in Phoenix, AZ
Catalyst: new DC announced in Phoenix, AZ
3× Warehouse / light-industrial in Grand Prairie, TX

plays.suggested_move: Warm intro from Dana Reyes (Dallas, TX) to the Phoenix, AZ ops contact; lead with our existing track record, confirm the roles are open to us, then scope a first crew.
plays.draft_opener: Hi [name], I hope this message finds you well. I saw the exciting news about GXO's new distribution center in Phoenix and wanted to reach out, given our strong partnership in Dallas where we're currently supporting 12 warehouse roles at a 91% fill rate. I'm wondering if you'd be interested in discussing how we might help staff the 15 open warehouse positions for this new location. Would you have some time to connect this week?

plays.headline: Initech — Clerical / data entry whitespace in Dallas, TX

gm.math_note: 3 open reqs × 60% our realized fill × 0.6 cold-geo haircut ≈ 1 winnable heads × $8.00/hr spread × 900h/assignment.

evidence.label: 3 Clerical / data entry reqs in Dallas, TX
2× Clerical / data entry in Austin, TX

plays.suggested_move: Warm intro from Sam Okafor (Austin, TX) to the Dallas, TX ops contact; lead with our existing track record, confirm the roles are open to us, then scope a first crew.
plays.draft_opener:
Hi [name],

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to touch base about the exciting growth I see happening at Initech, particularly with your new hiring needs in Dallas. While we've been supporting your team in Austin with two clerical/data entry roles, I'm eager to explore how we might help expand our partnership to your Dallas market with the three open positions you currently have. Would you be open to a quick call to discuss how we can support your talent acquisition strategy?
